monitoring_logging.question: Why is monitoring important in cloud computing?
What is logging?
What is observability?
What is a metric?
What is an alert?
What is distributed tracing?
What is log aggregation?
What are dashboards used for?
What is the purpose of health checks?
Name some cloud monitoring services provided by AWS, Azure, and GCP.
Explain the difference between monitoring, logging, and observability.
How would you design an alerting strategy for production systems?
How do metrics, logs, and traces work together during troubleshooting?
How would you reduce alert fatigue?
Explain the RED and USE monitoring methodologies.
How would you monitor a Kubernetes cluster running production workloads?
What key metrics would you monitor for a web application?
How would you centralize logs across hundreds of cloud services?
Explain Service Level Indicators (SLIs), Service Level Objectives (SLOs), and Service Level Agreements (SLAs).
How would you investigate an increase in application latency using monitoring tools?
Design an observability platform for a global cloud-native application.
How would you build a monitoring architecture for thousands of cloud resources?
Explain strategies for monitoring multi-cloud environments.
How would you identify performance bottlenecks using logs, metrics, and traces?
Design an automated incident detection and response pipeline.
How would you monitor serverless workloads at scale?
How would you ensure monitoring systems remain reliable during large-scale outages?
Explain how AI and machine learning can improve cloud observability.
How would you design monitoring that satisfies regulatory compliance and auditing requirements?
Design an enterprise monitoring strategy balancing reliability, scalability, cost, and operational efficiency.
A production application suddenly experiences high latency. Explain how you would use monitoring data to identify the root cause.
Your operations team receives thousands of alerts every day, many of which are false positives. Explain how you would improve the alerting strategy.
A cloud service crashes intermittently, but logs appear normal. Explain how you would investigate using observability tools.
A multinational enterprise wants centralized monitoring across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Describe your architecture.
A critical service exceeds its Service Level Objective. Explain how you would investigate and respond.
Your Kubernetes cluster experiences intermittent pod failures. Walk me through your monitoring and troubleshooting process.
A compliance audit requires one year of searchable logs with strict access controls. Explain your logging strategy.
An application experiences performance degradation after a deployment. Explain how monitoring tools would help isolate the issue.
A cloud-native application serves millions of requests per minute. Explain how you would design monitoring that remains scalable and cost-effective.

You are the lead Cloud Engineer responsible for monitoring a global cloud platform. Explain how you would design observability, alerting, logging, tracing, dashboards, incident response, and continuous service improvement.
